content:
# Solubilization Parameter

**Summary**: A measure of the ability of a surfactant to solubilize oil into the microemulsion phase.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1987-fuseni|Fuseni, 1987]] evaluated solubilization parameters to assess the effectiveness of different surfactants.

## Scientific Context

- [[1987-fuseni|Fuseni, 1987]] Solubilization is critical for creating a stable middle phase.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[1987-fuseni|Fuseni, 1987]] determined via titration and calculation.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The relationship between solubilization parameter and IFT at optimal salinity is inversely proportional. ([[1987-fuseni|Fuseni, 1987, p. 38]])
